There are 45 other vendor keys in that yaml with category_id: null, which could mean other dropped rows exist elsewhere too. How do you want to proceed?","header":"Scope of fix","options":[{"label":"Fix just this Walmart row now","description":"Insert the missing $22.42 expense (category Personal, matching precedent for similar FL Walmart purchases), set its vendor_category.yaml category_id from null to 3, and update this report.html.
